description_long: This is a modern, geometric wooden cabinet or shelf with a striking angular design. The structure features a cubic form with two opposing triangular cutouts on adjacent faces, creating a dynamic, sculptural appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the object a natural and warm aesthetic. The interior is partially open, with intersecting diagonal panels that form the triangular voids, providing both visual interest and potential storage or display space. The top and two sides are solid, while the other two sides are defined by the angular cutouts. This piece would serve as a functional and decorative element in urban environments such as parks, plazas, or contemporary public spaces.
description: A cubic wooden cabinet or shelf with dramatic triangular cutouts and intersecting diagonal panels, showcasing a modern geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large triangular cutout and intersecting diagonal panel, revealing the open interior.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wooden face with no visible openings or cutouts.
description_view_2: Opposite face to view 0, featuring a mirrored triangular cutout and intersecting panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side to view 1, also a solid wooden face with no openings.
